title: Cottagecore GUI
description: A texture pack that makes your GUI cottagecore! ‪‪❤︎‬
body:
# Cottagecore GUI

![Mycena interrupta.]                         (https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d44485ec84b8432e87ba2224b5fdf842a4714c0c.jpeg)

[Subscribe to my YouTube channel! ‪‪❤︎‬](https://www.youtube.com/@ceritakara)

## ❤︎‪‪ Have you ever wanted to have mossy logs with shroomies on your GUI?

Then Cottagecore GUI's got you covered! Welcome, fellow crafters and dreamers! Are you ready to trade the sterile, pixelated interfaces of vanilla Minecraft for something a little more... enchanted? Then let me introduce you to Cottagecore GUI, my heartfelt texture pack designed to infuse your game's user interface with warmth, nature, and a touch of rustic charm.

At its core, Cottagecore GUI is all about bringing the cozy, idyllic aesthetic of a woodland cottage right into your screen, transforming the mundane into the magical. Forget those stark grey buttons! The star of the show, and what truly sets this pack apart, is the complete overhaul of your GUI widgets and buttons. Imagine every button you click, every slider you interact with, recast as a beautifully detailed mossy log segment, complete with tiny, jewel-toned mushrooms sprouting from its sides. 

Cottagecore GUI isn't just about changing how things look; it's about changing how things feel. It's about making every interaction with your game's interface feel like a gentle embrace from nature. It’s for those who love building quaint little homes in flower-filled meadows, tending to their pixelated farms, and getting lost in the simpler joys of Minecraft. This pack ensures that even when you're managing your tweaking settings, you're never pulled away from the immersive, cozy, cottagecore fantasy you've so lovingly built.

So, if you're ready to swap the cold steel of default interfaces for the inviting warmth of wood, moss, and mushrooms, give Cottagecore GUI a try. Let your Minecraft journey be as comforting and enchanting on the inside as it is on the outside!
